profile_content: Full-Stack Software Engineer with 12+ years of experience delivering production-grade web and mobile applications across fintech, blockchain, and e-commerce domains. Experienced in React, Next.js, React Native, and NestJS, with hands-on expertise in cloud infrastructure (AWS), CI/CD pipelines, and scalable API design. Known for bridging frontend and backend concerns, leading frontend teams, mentoring developers, and integrating AI-assisted development workflows to accelerate delivery. Proven experience across the full software development lifecycle in fast-paced Agile environments.
